methodology.description: OpenRouter free routing chooses the final country attribution and canonical threat category for each headline.

regional_summary_6h.headline: Cross-border Iran-Israel strikes escalate, Syria embassy attack, Georgia-Azerbaijan tensions
bullets: Israel struck Gaza, Iran, and Lebanon while Iran fired missiles into Haifa, escalating cross-border military tensions.
Syrian authorities arrested suspects and continue pursuing those involved in the attack on the UAE Embassy in Damascus.
Azerbaijani state media shifted to a harsh tone towards Tbilisi, heightening diplomatic tensions with Georgia.
